introSection:
Dubai Drone (Arabic: غزل معدات) is an indoor steel spinning roller coaster located at Play DXB Dubai Mall in Dubai, the United Arab Emirates.

The ride was originally themed to Sega's Sonic the Hedgehog franchise and named Spin Gear.

The ride was closed from 2 June 2017 to 27 February 2018.
fullText:
Dubai Drone (Arabic: غزل معدات) is an indoor steel spinning roller coaster located at Play DXB Dubai Mall in Dubai, the United Arab Emirates.

The ride was originally themed to Sega's Sonic the Hedgehog franchise and named Spin Gear.

The ride was closed from 2 June 2017 to 27 February 2018.
